nouns.summary: Azor is stated to have “begotten/born” the next person in the genealogy, specifically Sadok.
Sadok is stated to have “begotten/born” the next person in the genealogy, specifically Achim.
Achim is stated to have “begotten/born” the next person in the genealogy, specifically Elioud.
Elioud is presented as the person who is born/begotten as the child of Achim within the genealogy.
